title: RGB Water
description: Changes the color of translucent objects to RGB
body:
## Description

Changes the color of translucent objects to RGB. The color will change for water, nether portal, stained glass, ice and slime.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DxcBIYaO/images/3334a4c0854144abaac5562424113d6930fe25b0.gif)
